<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Analyze current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
adj = seg['adjacency_list']

print("Step:", current_frame.step, "Level:", current_frame.level)
print("Shape:", current_frame.shape)
print("Valid actions:", valid_actions)

from collections import defaultdict
by_color = defaultdict(list)
for n in nodes:
    by_color[n['color']].append(n)

print("\nObjects by color:")
for color, objs in by_color.items():
    total_pixels = sum(o['pixels'] for o in objs)
    print("  %s: %d object(s), total %d pixels" % (color, len(objs), total_pixels))
    for o in objs:
        print("    Node %d: pixels=%d, children=%s" % (o['id'], o['pixels'], str(o['children'])))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
